_comment: EXAMPLE: copy your main folders to a new PC. Steps: (1) replace YourName below, (2) run on the OLD pc:  folder-transfer.bat -Config sync.json  (3) copy the generated download-scripts file to the NEW pc and run it. Standard JSON: in paths use forward slashes C:/path or doubled backslashes C:\path. Ignore rules: a bare name (no slash) matches at ANY depth; '*' matches inside one name; '**' matches across folders (any depth); a trailing '/' means folders only. Only 'folders' is required; the rest are optional and shown with their defaults.
